name: IconSearch - Free SVG Icons
description: Search and copy 351,639 free online SVG icons from 16 named libraries and 224 Iconify collections.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://api.iconify.design https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://iconsearch.info https://api.iconify.design https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; style-src 'self';
